d.description: New crate with TestHarness struct: hidden window, Metal renderer, HitTree, debug server integration. Foundation for all integration tests.
d.title: Create motif_test crate with TestHarness

d.description: HitTree collects element bounds during paint with z-order. ElementId identifies elements. hit_test() returns topmost element at point.
d.title: Implement HitTree and ElementId

d.description: Add hit_tree to PaintContext, register_hit() method. Elements call this during paint to become hit-testable.
d.title: Integrate HitTree with PaintContext

d.description: assert_hit(), assert_no_hit(), assert_bounds(). Common test fixtures: nested divs, overlapping elements, etc.
d.title: Test assertions and fixtures

d.description: On MouseInput, query hit_tree with cursor position. Track pressed_element and hovered_element in App state. Fire events on click (press + release on same element).
d.title: Wire hit testing to mouse events

d.description: Track hovered_element, pressed_element, and provide click detection. Add debug CLI command input.interactions to inspect state.
d.title: Add interaction state to InputState

d.description: Button with on_click callback, visual states (normal/hover/pressed). Registers for hit testing. Demo in playground with counter.
d.title: Create interactive Button element

d.description: Commands: input.hit_test, input.move_to, input.click. Server queues simulated inputs, app polls and applies them. Returns element IDs for verification.
d.title: Add input simulation to debug server

d.description: OS-level input simulation using CGEvent APIs. Commands: input.move_to, input.click, input.drag. Translates window-local coordinates to screen coordinates. App-level simulation deferred to future automated testing work.
